transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverbend Care Line, this is Mia. What's going on today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I've had a fever and a really bad sore throat since yesterday, maybe 101 point 2.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry you're feeling rough. Any trouble breathing, swallowing, or swelling in your neck?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No trouble breathing, but swallowing hurts and my glands feel swollen.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, that sounds uncomfortable but not emergency-level. Any rash, or white patches in your throat that you can see?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Um, I think maybe some white spots on my tonsils, actually.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That combination could be strep throat, so it's worth getting checked and possibly tested today rather than waiting it out.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, should I go to urgent care or just wait for my regular doctor?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Urgent care is your best bet today. There's one at Maple Grove Clinic on 5th Street open until 8pm, I can send you the address.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sending it now by text. Drink fluids, rest your voice, and go in if you develop trouble breathing or can't swallow liquids.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Got it, thank you so much.
